title: Duplicate "into" a new Board or Group

posts.author: cia.hang.mychapter (Cia Hang)
posts.cookedHtml: Need to be able to use the “duplicate” feature in combindation with the “move to” feature. Right now, “duplicate” will postfix “(copy)” to duplicate items, because the original already exists, which means after it’s moved, you have to manually update all the items to remove “(copy)”. It’s a huge oversight on the features/capabilities.
